claim_limit: These seeds document local parser/property/fuzz coverage only. They do not expose a public server, call Steam, execute live networking, validate gameplay payloads, or claim release-candidate hardening.

seeds.mutation: all packet lengths from 0 through 47 bytes
protocol_version set to 99 on a valid fixture header
client_command_batch payload_len set to 1100 and packet resized to match
flip each byte in the fixed 48-byte header of a valid fixture
seeds.expected_property: decode never panics and never mutates authoritative state for reject or disconnect outcomes

seeds.mutation: local/mock auth and command freshness state table
seeds.expected_property: missing/rejected auth and stale/replayed commands never mutate authoritative state
